title: No More Smithing - Craft Netherite
description: give the option of crafting netherite tools, weapons and armour without templates but using more netheire ingots.
body:
Gives the regular crafting recipies to netherite items, giving you more choice in how you craft netherite. Hunt for diamonds and templates or use more netherite ingots?

**All netherite tools and armour is included.**

Example recipies:

![netherite sword being crafted](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c4ec0a1cdd94147d1ec5d9ed67290fef4b7c44d.png)

![netherite chestplate being crafted](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75ba527bca5b3b7942a6508cf8b453d8a7d31ce2.png)
